title: 3mm Satin Ribbon 46m Thick Double Face Grosgrain Silk Ribbon, [for Gift Wrapping, Hair Bows, Wedding, Cake, Flower] - 50 Yard/150ft/ Dark Pink
features: 1-[Good Feature]: Polyester ribbons in various colors, beautiful and elegant, can meet different decorative needs; Pastel satin ribbon for bow, making it convenient for daily gift wrapping and bouquet decoration
2-[Perfect Size]: Flat Width : 1/8 inch(3mm); Length : 46m/50 Yard/150ft

3-[Wide Application]: Thin satin ribbons can be used for gift wrapping, such as Christmas, Valentine's Day, Thanksgiving, Mother's Day, Teacher's Day, Halloween, etc., to decorate various gift boxes and baskets. Double sided ribbon is used in flower shops to package bouquets, flower baskets, wreaths, etc. Silk ribbon is an elegant wedding decoration used to decorate chairs, floral arrangements, candles, cars, etc. Grosgrain ribbon can also be used for clothing, for hair accessories, for DIY

4-[Material]: Grosgrain ribbon is soft and smooth, with a comfortable touch, making it a great accessory for clothing and hair. Ribbon is commonly used for gift wrapping, bouquet decoration, DIY crafts, clothing decoration, weddings, birthday events, and celebration decorations, etc. Pastel ribbon is used to decorate chairs, tablecloths, floral arrangements, etc.
5-[Tips]: Please confirm the correct size before ordering
